name: NATURAL GAS SERVICES GROUP INC
summary: Natural Gas Services Group Inc (NGS) provides natural gas compression services and equipment to the oil and gas industry. The company focuses on renting, selling, and servicing compression equipment used in the production and transportation of natural gas. NGS primarily serves upstream oil and gas producers who require compression solutions to enhance and maintain production from their wells.
